coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 6:00 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 75% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 0% done. 42 minutes left. This feels like cheating. It's not. It's science. Probably.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 80% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 10:00 at 80%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/5. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/5. 10:00 at 80%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 10:00 at 80%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 2:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/5. 55% FTP, Seated. 2:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 2:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 36% complete. Block 2/5. This is where you prove you're serious.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 36% through session. Block 2/5. You've done 10min of threshold work.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/5. 8:00 at 100%. You're building the engine that wins races.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 2: 100% for 8:00. Like Groundhog Day, but with more lactic acid.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 2/5. Comfortably hard. Breathe deep. Trust the process.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 53% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 55% for 2:00. Then 20min to question life choices.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 57% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This one: 110% for 6:00. Next up: 2:00 recovery, then 4min at 115%.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 57% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 57% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 57% done. 110% for 6:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 69% done. 0 intervals left. 12 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 24min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 69% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 12 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is where you earn it. 1 more reps. Your legs are screaming. Good.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 4: 115% FTP. You're 36 minutes in. Power should feel hard but repeatable. Adjust if fading.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 4/5. You're building something real here. 1 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 1 reps to go. Your body is writing a strongly worded letter. You won't read it until after cooldown.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 73% complete. Rep 4/5. Fatigue is real — hold form. 115%, 90-100 rpm.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 40 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 81% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 81% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 2:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last one. Your body is lying — you have more. Prove it. Then you can rest.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last rep. 120-120% FTP, 90-100 rpm. Seated. Finish strong, then 4 minutes easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final rep! 2:00 at 120%. Leave nothing in reserve. You'll be cooling down in 4 minutes.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Last one. 2:00 at 120%. Then 4 minutes to contemplate your life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last rep. 120-120% FTP, 90-100 rpm, Seated. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 90% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 30min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 44 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 44 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
